hero.subtitle: Smart queue management for clinics and patients
hero.descriptionLine1: MedQ helps patients check wait times, get notified when it's their turn, and arrive at the right moment.
hero.descriptionLine2: Clinics reduce crowding and keep every visit running smoothly.
hero.imageAlt: Modern hospital reception with patients waiting comfortably
